name: SQL Availability and GeoDR
impact_description: Handles SQL database availability and geo-disaster recovery. Degradation causes SQL DB availability issues and failover errors.

sli_symptoms.sliId: DB Heartbeat.SQL DB Heartbeat - Availability - BC/Premium.Signal
symptoms: SQL DB failover operations fail or are delayed
SQL DB read replicas become unavailable

symptoms: SQL DB failover operations fail or are delayed
